title: FIGS Stock Plunges After Sharp Rally Tests Valuation
text: Technical analysis showing FIGS stock price momentum following Q1 earnings beat and guidance raise. Stock rallied strongly initially before profit-taking brought levels back down as investors questioned sustainability at elevated valuation levels. P/E ratio of 53.50 remains stretched relative to historical averages and peer group. Stock price decline despite earnings beat reflects classic market pattern of growth expectations already priced in. Volatility around earnings releases showing trader participation and short-term trading activity. Longer-term trend remains positive with 1-year return of 153.66% from lows, indicating strong investor interest in growth narrative. Key technical levels and support resistance will guide near-term price action as investors await next earnings catalyst.
